Statute.Title: Consumer-Driven Banking Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Services bancaires axés sur les consommateurs, Loi sur les)

CIF.Text: CIF, 2026, c. 3, s. 224, enacting ss. 1 to 181 of the Consumer-Driven Banking Act, in force on assent 26.03.2026, except,

Item.Text: — ss. 10 to 12, 15 to 73, 75 to 112, 114(3), 115(b) to (u), 116, 120 to 122, 133 to 135, 140 to 142, 144 to 146, 150 to 168, 171 and 180 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 181 of the Consumer-Driven Banking Act— Not in force
